mapper.select: SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tree WHERE plot_id = p.plot_id) AS tree_count FROM plot p
SELECT plot_id FROM plot ORDER BY plot_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plot(plot_code, region_id, latitude, longitude, elevation, area, survey_year, plot_type, description) VALUES(#{plotCode}, #{regionId}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{elevation}, #{area}, #{surveyYear}, #{plotType}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE plot SET plot_code = #{plotCode}, region_id = #{regionId}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, elevation = #{elevation}, area = #{area}, survey_year = #{surveyYear}, plot_type = #{plotType}, description = #{description} WHERE plot_id = #{plotId}
